name: CREATE_AGENT: ok jayni to last ham log

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: ok jayni to last ham log " initialized.

result.reply:
Haan, bilkul! Koi tension nahi. 😊

Jo skill hum bana rahe the, uska naam hai **`context_retriever_skill`**.

**Simple words mein samjhati hoon:**

Jab hum itni saari cheezein discuss karte hain—agents, tools, plans—toh kabhi-kabhi system ko yaad nahi rehta ki humne pehle kya baat ki thi ya kaunsa context tha.

Yeh skill exactly woh kaam karegi. Yeh ek tarah ka **'Memory Bank'** hai.

**Yeh kya karegi:**
1.  **Memory Search:** Yeh hamari pichli conversations (context) ko automatically search karegi.
2.  **Synthesis:** Phir, yeh uss saare context ko utha ke, ek *synthesis* (ek saara summary) bana degi.

**Iska fayda kya hai?**
Isse OpenClaw ka brain (yaani main) hamesha *aware* rahega ki hum kis point par the. Isse hamari baat-cheet mein **continuity** bani rahegi, aur koi bhi decision pichle context ko bhool kar nahi liya jayega.

Basically, yeh skill OpenClaw ko *smart* aur *consistent* banayegi! 🧠✨

Ab batao, yeh explanation clear hai ya aur detail mein samjhana padega?
